title: Kyiv: Air defense active
description: Lockheed Martin reveals cheaper Patriot air defense interceptor amid surging global demand. The new Patriot PAC-3 Adapted Capability Effector, known as PAC-3 ACE, will cost less than half as much as the existing PAC-3 MSE interceptor, according to Lockheed Martin.
description_en: Lockheed Martin reveals cheaper Patriot air defense interceptor amid surging global demand. The new Patriot PAC-3 Adapted Capability Effector, known as PAC-3 ACE, will cost less than half as much as the existing PAC-3 MSE interceptor, according to Lockheed Martin.

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Up to 145 Russian troops remain in Kostiantynivka as Ukrainian forces hold defense, military says. The Kostiantynivka sector remains one of the most intense areas of the front, with Russian forces launching up to 20 attacks a day and continuing attempts to infiltrate deeper into the city, according to Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi.
description_en: Up to 145 Russian troops remain in Kostiantynivka as Ukrainian forces hold defense, military says. The Kostiantynivka sector remains one of the most intense areas of the front, with Russian forces launching up to 20 attacks a day and continuing attempts to infiltrate deeper into the city, according to Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi.

title: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir...

description: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir Starmer officially left the post of Prime Minister of Great Britain 👥 King Charles III accepted Starmer's resignation and officially appointed Burnham as the head of the government. 💬 Earlier, Burnham stated that he would maintain the current level of support for Ukraine. He also stressed that Great Britain lives in an increasingly dangerous world
description_en: 🇬🇧 Andy Burnham became the new head of His Majesty's government, Keir Starmer officially left the post of Prime Minister of Great Britain 👥 King Charles III accepted Starmer's resignation and officially appointed Burnham as the head of the government. 💬 Earlier, Burnham stated that he would maintain the current level of support for Ukraine. Він також наголошував, що Велика Британія живе у дедалі небезпечнішому світі

During his visit, Kyiv suffered another massive Russian missile and drone attack. No briefing can convey the reality of this war...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: From July 1 to July 19, the Russian army used two-thirds of the planned yearly production of Zircons for attacks on Ukraine. At the same time, the total number of ballistic missiles used by the Russian Federation exceeded the total monthly volume of their production, reported the Ukrainian profile publication "Milytarny". So, according to the calculations of the authors of the publication, taking into account the massive strike on the night of July 19, Russia since the beginning of the month...

description_uk: С 1 по 19 июля армия РФ использовала для ударов по Украине две трети запланированного годового производства "Цирконов" При этом общее количество примененных РФ баллистических ракет превысило совокупный месячный объем их производства, сообщило украинское профильное издание "Милитарный". description: Ukrainian drones strike 7 Russian shadow fleet vessels, power facilities in occupied Crimea, military says. Three tankers and four dry cargo ships were hit in the Black and Azov seas as part of Operation “MoLoCHKa,” according to Unmanned Systems Forces Commander Robert Brovdi.

title: 400 missiles
description: "Iskander" will be detected more easily than the S-400 missile: why the alarm is sometimes announced almost at the moment of impact The S-400 anti-missile missiles fly at a much lower altitude and have a very short flight time, so the air alert is sometimes announced almost simultaneously with the impact. title: 400 drones
description: 400 drones flew to Moscow at night. Previously, in Podolsk one of the largest logistics hubs Wildberries, as well as an oil depot, was hit. They also write that the fire was recorded in the industrial park "Yuzhnye Vorota" in Domodedovo.

description_uk: На Москву ночью летели 400 дронов Предварительно, в Подольске поражен один из крупнейших логистических хабов Wildberries, а также нефтебаза. Также пишут, что пожар зафиксирован в индустриальном парке «Южные Ворота» в Домодедово.

title: Kyiv: Drone attack
description: Oil depot, logistics center reportedly struck in Moscow Oblast amid Ukrainian drone attack. Ukrainian forces launched a drone attack on Moscow Oblast overnight on July 20, reportedly striking an oil depot as well as a logistics center in the region, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Russian missile strike on civilian grain ship in Black Sea kills 5. Five people were killed and five others remain missing after a Russian missile strike hit a civilian cargo ship carrying grain in the Black Sea on July 19, according to Ukraine's Navy and Foreign Ministry.
description_en: Russian missile strike on civilian grain ship in Black Sea kills 5. Five people were killed and five others remain missing after a Russian missile strike hit a civilian cargo ship carrying grain in the Black Sea on July 19, according to Ukraine's Navy and Foreign Ministry.

title: Strike confirmed
description: Five sailors were killed as a result of a Russian strike on a civilian ship near Odessa, five more are missing, - the Ukrainian Navy reports that Russia struck the GOLDEN LEO dry cargo ship with the flag of Guinea-Bissau, owned by the Turkish owner, with three Kh-59/Kh-69 cruise missiles. A ship with a cargo of grain was leaving the war zone. After the impact, a fire broke out on board. Eight members...

A ship with a cargo of grain was leaving the war zone. After the impact, a fire broke out on board. Eight members...
